articles.title: How to Watch the Formula 1 Barcelona Grand Prix Live for Free
articles.description: Can Kimi Antonelli make it six wins in a row? Here's how you can watch this weekend's F1 race using a streaming subscription or a VPN.

articles.title: Pakistani national apprehended near LoC in Kupwara; investigation underway
articles.description: The apprehension was the result of a coordinated joint operation, code-named 'Operation Simri', conducted by the Indian Army's Chinar Warriors and the Jammu and Kashmir Police

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Why Neymar won't play Brazil's opening fixture against Morocco; when is he expected to return
articles.description: Brazil, who are part of Group C, play their first match on June 14 (as per Indian Standard Time) at MetLife Stadium in New York.

articles.title: Manager with gas distribution agency booked in Mumbai for misappropriating 5800 gas cylinders worth Rs 90 lakh
articles.description: A gas agency manager in Goregaon has been accused of misappropriating over 5800 gas cylinders valued at Rs 90 lakh. The owner filed a complaint after discovering discrepancies in records, with hundreds of commercial cylinders untraceable. The manager reportedly went incommunicado after the discovery, prompting police investigation.

articles.title: Rao Bahadur Teaser: Satya Dev undergoes intense transformation in Venkatesh Maha's horror-comedy
articles.description: The teaser of Rao Bahadur offers a chilling glimpse into a psychological horror-comedy led by a transformed Satya Dev. Directed by Venkatesh Maha, the film has already generated buzz for its intriguing premise and the actor's striking makeover.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Oscar Wilde: "Art is the most intense mode of individualism that the world has known"
articles.description: The pressure to please others often stifles creativity, pushing creators towards safe, trend-driven content. Oscar Wilde's assertion that art is the ultimate individualism highlights how true art stems from the maker's unique vision, not public demand. In today's algorithm-driven world, this warning about chasing approval is more relevant than ever.

articles.title: Caught On Cam: Maharashtra Government Employee Stabbed Multiple Times In Neck, Back By Colleague
articles.description: The injured woman was rushed to the hospital, and her condition is reported to be critical.

articles.title: David Beckham gets Hollywood Walk of Fame star; Tom Cruise's tribute leaves fans emotional
articles.description: David Beckham received his star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in a ceremony attended by wife Victoria Beckham and their children, but it was Tom Cruise's heartfelt speech that stole the spotlight. Calling Beckham's journey a "Hollywood story," the Mission: Impossible star praised his discipline, humility and family values, saying success never changed who he is. Cruise's emotional tribute quickly went viral, with fans applauding the actor's words about Beckham's legacy extending far beyond football and trophies.

articles.title: Sejal Pawar Faces 15-Day Suspension Over Her ‘Male Cadavers’ Joke At Pranit More’s Show
articles.description: Pawar had been in the limelight for her remarks about comparing the sizes of male cadavers' genitalia while interacting with the audience during Pranit More's show.

articles.title: Content of national importance, security clearance for key posts: What’s in I&B ministry’s draft rules for TV, radio
articles.description: The proposed rules will cover television channels, DTH services, HITS platforms, teleport, radio, news agencies supplying footage to television, and IPTV services. Stakeholders have been invited to submit comments to the draft rules by July 27

articles.title: Mamata Banerjee's Toughest Political Test Yet? TMC Rebels Make Their Move
articles.description: A group of 19 TMC MPs are all set to ask the Speaker to recognise their faction as the real party. If this happens, Mamata Banerjee might find herself out of the party she founded. This has also raised questions about who will get the party's ₹220 crore assets.

articles.title: Indian-origin convict gets 34-year prison term in UK over rape, kidnapping and torture
articles.description: An Indian-origin man has been jailed for 34 years in the UK after being convicted of kidnapping, torturing and raping a 24-year-old woman in a case police described as "unimaginable" in its brutality.

articles.title: CUET PG 2026: NTA Clarifies No Score Normalisation For Rescheduled Exams
articles.description: NTA has clarified that every candidate's score is calculated based on the marks obtained in the examination, and no normalisation process is used.

articles.title: Seeing these strange signs at home? These may be signs of a cockroach infestation
articles.description: Cockroaches are masters of disguise, often signaling their presence through subtle clues before being seen. Homeowners should be aware of musty odors, small black droppings, brown egg capsules, wall smears, damaged packaging, and daytime sightings as key indicators of an infestation.

articles.title: Sew far, so good: Why the younger generation is turning to sewing and upcycling
articles.description: From Instagram inspiration to hands-on workshops, the younger generation is rediscovering sewing as a form of self-expression and mindfulness.

articles.title: US-Iran peace deal likely in Geneva on June 14: Check 5 key agenda points
articles.description: Nuclear limits, sanctions relief and Hormuz reopening headline a possible US-Iran breakthrough.

articles.title: Drishyam 3 OTT Release Date: When and where to watch Mohanlal starrer thriller drama
articles.description: Drishyam 3 is renowned for its tense plot, deft turns, and captivating performances, which have over the years amassed a devoted following across all languages and demographics. Fans' wait will soon be over as the highly anticipated Mohanlal starrer thriller drama will soon arrive on OTT.

articles.title: 'In National Interest': 20 Rebel MPs To Meet Lok Sabha Speaker To Stake Claim As 'Asli TMC', Back NDA
articles.description: A faction of around 20 rebel TMC MPs has announced their support for the BJP-led NDA, citing national interest. Suspended TMC leader Riju Dutta indicated that a meeting with Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla is planned.

articles.description: FSSAI has issued notices to Nestlé, KFC, Flipkart, and Open Secret over complaints of selling contaminated products and hygiene issues.

articles.description: Amid a deepening crisis within the TMC, Abhishek Banerjee struck a conciliatory tone after Kalyan Banerjee's blistering attack, seeking to defuse tensions as rebellion and factionalism rock the party.

articles.title: Saudi Arabia to require Premium Residency holders to obtain dedicated work permits
articles.description: Saudi Arabia's Premium Residency holders must now secure a dedicated work permit via the Qiwa digital platform, costing SR100. This new requirement is part of broader labor market updates, including clarified rules for training contracts and resignations. Visa amendments necessitate cancellation and reissuance, with fees payable through various digital methods.

articles.title: IND vs AFG ODIs: Spotlight on Rohit Sharma as World Cup auditions begin for 2027
articles.description: Rohit Sharma faces an audition for his ODI future, needing to prove his fitness and form ahead of the next World Cup. Captain Shubman Gill grapples with selection decisions, potentially looking beyond the veteran. The series against Afghanistan also serves as a platform to test new batting combinations with Virat Kohli sidelined.

articles.title: Mahesh Babu Cheers For Team Rao Bahadur, Rahul Ravindran Calls Gesture Heartwarming - Here's Why

articles.title: Life lesson of the day by Gregory Peck: ‘Inside of all the makeup and the character... it’s you’ To Kill a Mockingbird actor on the power of authenticity in an appearance-obsessed world
articles.description: Gregory Peck's iconic portrayal of Atticus Finch highlighted the power of integrity and empathy over outward appearances. His philosophy, captured in a memorable quote, emphasizes that audiences connect with the genuine human response to life's challenges, not just the performance or persona.
